examples: But I charged him 20 Gulden for every week he stayed there.
Gulden likes to say a mega-region is somewhere you can walk all the way across, from one side to the other, carrying nothing but some money without ever getting thirsty or hungry.
Gulden added its spring merchandise sold well and its fall merchandise had a strong start for the third quarter.
He offers him 300 gulden to give up his claim on Marenka.
